sourceTitle: Use of Artificial Intelligence Tools in Teaching, Learning and Assessments - A Guide for Students
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Penalties for offences of academic dishonesty may include reviewable/permanent demerit(s), failure grade for the course concerned, suspension from the University, lowering the degree classification, and termination of studies at the University.
